creator: mr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186657
Screenshot boot

Hi,
on a VPS (virtual private server) (https://www.netcup.de/) I could install
and use FreeBSD 11.0.
After upgrading to 11.1 or latest 11-STABLE kernel I get during boot (before mountroot):

run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after ... seconds for xpt_config.

The host system seems to be using Linux kvm.

A screenshot is attached.
